D

David Anastas

SVP, Data & Analytics

LinkedIn

About

David Anastas is Senior Vice President of Data & Analytics at BPD, where he leads the vision and execution of BPD’s end-to-end analytics program and data product strategy. A researcher turned data pro, he thinks in patterns, plays in strategy, and thrives in the space between instinct and insight—turning complex information into clarity.

Having built the function from the ground up, David transforms data into actionable intelligence that powers smarter marketing, stronger decision-making, and measurable growth. With a focus on innovation, scalability, and precision, he bridges strategy and technology to deliver insights that drive performance across every channel. Known for shaping analytics into clear stories that move strategy forward, David ensures data serves not just as a resource, but as a competitive advantage.

A University of Florida rugby alum, he also loves soccer and growing bananas.

Fun Fact

David has never lost a thumb-wrestling match. Ever.
